lead_source.name: Lead Source
lead_source.description: How the contact entered the pipeline. Used for urgency scoring.

introducer_person_id.name: Introducer
introducer_person_id.description: Person who made the introduction. Used for introducer re-engagement flags.

last_outbound_date.name: Last Outbound Date
last_outbound_date.description: Date of most recent outbound email. Updated by agent after draft creation.

last_inbound_date.name: Last Inbound Date
last_inbound_date.description: Date of most recent inbound reply. Updated by agent on reply detection.

outreach_attempts.name: Outreach Attempts
outreach_attempts.description: Count of outreach attempts in current stage. Reset to 0 on stage advancement.

agent_tags.name: Agent Tags
agent_tags.description: Tags managed by the agent (do-not-contact, paused, etc).

investor_type.name: Investor Type
investor_type.description: Classification of investor for template personalization.

data_room_access.name: Data Room Access
data_room_access.description: Status of data room access. Used for DD-stage template routing.

paul_meeting_date.name: Paul Meeting Date
paul_meeting_date.description: Date of meeting with Paul. Used for post-meeting follow-up timing.

decline_reason.name: Decline Reason
decline_reason.description: Reason for declining. Captured for analytics.

estimated_aum.name: Estimated AUM
estimated_aum.description: Estimated assets under management for the investor.
